inputs.text:
blurry, low quality, realistic, 3D render, watermark, 
text, nsfw, revealing, background clutter, 
multiple characters, grayscale, brown, desaturated,
extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, colored background, gradient background, pink background, 
cyan background, teal background, background shapes, 
geometric background, colored panels
